data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
results = data.get\('results', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data
if isinstance\(results, list\):
    for t in results[-5:]:
        print\(f'Task {t[\\"id\\"]}: status={t.get\(\\"status\\"\)}, step={t.get\(\\"step_name\\"\)}, instance={t.get\(\\"workflow_instance\\"\)}'\)
else:
    print\(results\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development python << 'PYEOF'
import django; django.setup\(\)
from apps.procedures.models import *
from apps.procedures.utils import grade_quiz_attempt

attempt = TrainingAttempt.objects.get\(id='0dcdefec-85de-45ad-8400-1d3675a8dc4a'\)
vq = VersionQuiz.objects.get\(id='66c1f19c-848d-42b0-8612-0efccc5696ca'\)

qa = QuizAttempt.objects.create\(
    training_attempt=attempt, version_quiz=vq, attempt_number=2,
\)
print\('Created quiz attempt:', qa.id\)

questions = list\(vq.questions.all\(\)\)
for q in questions:
    first_option = q.options.first\(\)
    resp = QuestionResponse.objects.create\(
        quiz_attempt=qa, version_question=q,
        text_response='least privilege' if q.question_type == 'short_answer' else '',
        submitted_order=list\(str\(o\) for o in q.options.values_list\('id', flat=True\)\) if q.question_type == 'ordering' else None,
    \)
    if first_option and q.question_type not in \('short_answer', 'ordering'\):
        resp.selected_options.set\([first_option]\)
    print\(f'  Response for: {q.question_type} - {q.text[:40]}'\)

try:
    result = grade_quiz_attempt\(qa\)
    print\('Grade result:', result\)
    qa.score_earned = result['score_earned']
    qa.score_possible = result['score_possible']
    qa.score_percent = result['score_percent']
    qa.passed = result['passed']
    qa.passed_all_mandatory = result['passed_all_mandatory']
    from django.utils import timezone
    qa.completed_at = timezone.now\(\)
    qa.save\(\)
    print\('Save OK!'\)
except Exception as e:
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)

qa.responses.all\(\).delete\(\)
qa.delete\(\)
print\('Cleaned up'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development python << 'PYEOF'
import django; django.setup\(\)
from apps.procedures.models import *

attempt = TrainingAttempt.objects.get\(id='0dcdefec-85de-45ad-8400-1d3675a8dc4a'\)
vq_id = '66c1f19c-848d-42b0-8612-0efccc5696ca'
vq = VersionQuiz.objects.get\(id=vq_id\)

existing_count = attempt.quiz_attempts.filter\(version_quiz=vq\).count\(\)
print\('Existing count:', existing_count\)
print\('Max attempts:', vq.max_attempts\)

if vq.max_attempts > 0 and existing_count >= vq.max_attempts:
    best = attempt.quiz_attempts.filter\(version_quiz=vq\).order_by\('-score_percent'\).first\(\)
    print\('Best attempt:', best\)
    print\('Best score_percent:', best.score_percent, type\(best.score_percent\)\)
    try:
        val = float\(best.score_percent\)
        print\('float\(\) OK:', val\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\('float\(\) ERROR:', e\)
else:
    print\('Not at max yet'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd /c/Users/dabik/PycharmProjects/DFC-APPLICATION/backend && python -c "
import os; os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='config.settings.development'
import django; django.setup\(\)
from apps.procedures.models import TrainingAttempt
attempt = TrainingAttempt.objects.select_related\('assignment__procedure_version'\).prefetch_related\('step_completions__version_step__attachments'\).get\(id='df6493c8-81bc-4453-9b48-4e877831ef7f'\)
version = attempt.assignment.procedure_version
steps = version.steps.prefetch_related\('attachments'\).order_by\('order'\)
for s in steps:
    print\(f'--- Step {s.order}: {s.title} ---'\)
    print\(f'  video_url: {repr\(s.video_url\)}'\)
    print\(f'  require_manual_open: {s.require_manual_open}'\)
    print\(f'  require_media_completion: {s.require_media_completion}'\)
    print\(f'  require_quiz_pass: {s.require_quiz_pass}'\)
    atts = list\(s.attachments.all\(\)\)
    print\(f'  attachments \({len\(atts\)}\):'\)
    for a in atts:
        print\(f'    - [{a.attachment_type}] {a.title or a.file_name} -> {a.file}'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "^DEBUG\\|^INFO")

import django, os
os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='config.settings.development'
django.setup\(\)
from apps.permissions.utils import PermissionChecker
from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model
User = get_user_model\(\)
admin_user = User.objects.get\(id=16\)
checker = PermissionChecker\(admin_user\)
tests = ['can_create_procedure', 'can_edit_procedure', 'can_manage_assignments', 'can_audit_training']
for perm in tests:
    r = checker.has_global_permission\(perm\)
    print\(f'{perm}: {r}'\)
" 2>&1 | tail -6)
